description.zh-cn: PayPal 是全球领先的在线支付平台，支持 200+ 国家和 25 种货币。本插件基于 PayPal Orders v2 API，采用「跳转支付」模式：买家在 PayPal 完成授权后回跳商城自动扣款，并支持 Webhook 异步确认与签名校验，保障资金安全。
description.en: PayPal is a leading global online payment platform supporting 200+ countries and 25 currencies. This plugin uses the PayPal Orders v2 API with a redirect checkout flow: buyers approve on PayPal then return to the store for automatic capture, with webhook signature verification for secure asynchronous confirmation.
